meaning: 塔拉瓦岛 [西太平洋岛国基里巴斯的主岛]
examples: Two uninhabited Kiribati islands, Tebua Tarawa and Abanuea, disappeared underwater in 1999.
Golf can also be played on Ambo Island (part of Tarawa) where the green of the golf course is actually rolled sand.
Radio Kiribati reported that many parts of tarawa were flooded and causeways linking the islets were covered with seawater.
The USS Tarawa recently left Hawaii, and it could go to Bangladesh as well, officials said.
When Stevie dropped out in Hawaii, Jason carried on spending 73 days alone at sea to reach the tiny coral atoll of Tarawa.
